title: Execution Freeze Protocol
description: Formal protocol for suspending execution authority during recovery operations. Defines freeze states, transition rules, mandatory guarantees, and the thaw procedure.
purpose: Ensure recovery modes operate on a quiescent runtime by definitively suspending all execution authority before any repair action.

states.description: Normal operations. Execution authority is active. Tickets may advance.
Freeze signal emitted. Runtime is transitioning to frozen state. Guarantees not yet confirmed.
All execution authority suspended. Recovery operations may proceed. No ticket advancement permitted.
Recovery complete. Thaw signal emitted. Integrity validation in progress.
Integrity validation passed. Runtime ready to resume normal operations.

transitions.description: Recovery mode entry requested. Freeze signal emitted to all runtime surfaces.
All freeze guarantees confirmed. Runtime is quiescent.
Freeze conditions not met. Return to normal operations.
Recovery operations complete. Begin integrity validation.
Integrity validation passed. Runtime ready for normal mode transition.
Integrity validation failed. Return to frozen state for additional repair.
Normal operations resumed. Execution authority restored.

forbidden_transitions.reason: Must pass through FREEZE_INITIATED and confirm guarantees.
Must pass through THAW_INITIATED, integrity validation, and THAWED.
Must pass through integrity validation in THAW_INITIATED.

invariants.description: Recovery modes may only operate when freeze has been initiated.
No execution may be active while runtime is frozen.
Thaw may only complete after integrity validation passes.

freeze_guarantees.description: Mandatory guarantees that must be active before FROZEN state is confirmed.

guarantees.description: No ticket may transition from planned to ready, ready to executing, or executing to complete during freeze.
guarantees.verification: all ticket JSONs have stable status

guarantees.description: No autonomous execution scripts may run. Scheduled tasks, self-healing, and enforcement must be suspended.
No new execution locks may be acquired. Existing locks may be released but not created.
Any checkpoint mutation during freeze requires explicit audit trail with incident_id and repair_id.
Milestone and ticket runtime state may not advance. Projections may be refreshed but not advanced.
Governance event streams remain append-only. Recovery events may be emitted. No events may be deleted or mutated.

thaw_procedure.description: Mandatory steps to restore execution authority after recovery.

steps.action: recovery audit finalized and appended to event stream
thaw authorization emitted by reconciliation authority
freeze guarantees released in reverse order
mode transition to NORMAL mode emitted
